revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Over-quotation}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Over-quotation | type = style | issue = This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|{{{1|article}}}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:Manual_of_Style#Quotations|{{#if:{{{many|}}}|too many|{{#if:{{{lengthy|}}}|overly lengthy|{{#if:{{{both|}}}|too many and overly lengthy|too many or overly lengthy}}}}}} quotations]]'''. | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} summarize the quotations]. Consider transferring direct quotations to [[q:Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}|Wikiquote]] or excerpts to [[s:Special:Search/{{PAGENAME}}|Wikisource]]. | date = {{{date|}}} }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}<!--{{Over-quotation}} end--> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLACE LANGUAGES AND CATS ON /doc PAGE, NOT HERE --></noinclude> [[sn:Over-quotation]] [[Category:Templates]]

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Over-quotation}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Over-quotation | type = style | issue = This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|{{{1|article}}}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:Manual_of_Style#Quotations|{{#if:{{{many|}}}|too many|{{#if:{{{lengthy|}}}|overly lengthy|{{#if:{{{both|}}}|too many and overly lengthy|too many or overly lengthy}}}}}} quotations]]'''. | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} summarize the quotations]. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
